name: Canvas
description: Collaborative spatial canvas with shapes, zoom/pan, and multi-user cursors
details: SVG-based canvas with shape tools (rect, ellipse, line, text), color picker, zoom/pan, keyboard shortcuts, and real-time multi-user cursor display. Document metadata stored in RecordRoom, shape data via useCanvas hook.
instructions: All components are co-located under src/features/canvas/ so relative imports within the feature work as-is
